expected_signals.summary: SpaceX is described as already public at a $1.77 trillion valuation, while Anthropic and OpenAI are framed as prospective trillion-scale IPOs.

notes: No runnable verifier: this is a static-document extraction task. Observable proof is that each anchor_quote is an exact substring from the provided text. Anthropic and OpenAI IPOs are described as pending or possible, while SpaceX is described as already public.
